zh.Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkney於1135年出生在蘇格蘭費伏梅爾時，她的父親Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife17歲，母親Ada Huntingdon11歲。她於大約1148年與Harold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkney結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1160年在蘇格蘭費伏享年25歲。

zh-hans.Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland: 苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯
zh-hans.Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland: 英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkney于1135年出生在苏格兰費伏梅爾时，她的父亲Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife17岁，母亲Ada Huntingdon11岁。她于大约1148年与Harold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkney结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1160年在苏格兰費伏享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Fife
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province and former kingdom of Fife in East Scotland, a name of obscure etymology. Tradition has it that the name is derived from an eponymous Fib, one of the seven sons of Cruithne, legendary founding father of the Picts.

nameMeanings.name: Maddad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Samir, Khalil, Nabil, Sami, Nadim, Fouad, Ghassan, Ibrahim, Kamel, Salim, Jamal, Bassam.  French Emile, Michel, Antoine, Andre, Camille, Georges, Pierre, Aime, Christophe, Jacques, Leonie, Philippe.
Arabic and Jewish (from North Africa): occupational name for a blacksmith, from Arabic ḥaddād. Its Arabic bearers are both Muslims and Christians.
Iranian: cognate of 1 above, from Persian ḥaddād ‘blacksmith’, a word of Arabic origin.

variants.name: Haddadin
meanings: Arabic (Jordan): derivative of Arabic ḥaddād ‘blacksmith’ (see Haddad ). The suffix -in might be honorific-dual.

variants.name: Hadad
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Sima, Eliezer, Haim, Igal, Moshe, Nuriel, Yochanan.  Arabic/Muslim Abdalla, Atta, Ibrahim, Jalal, Jamal, Najib, Nawal, Raouf, Salem, Soliman.  Spanish Patricio, Alejandro, Eduardo, Jose, Manuel, Marivel, Miguel.
Arabic and Jewish Sephardic: variant of   Haddad   ‘blacksmith’.

nameMeanings.name: Aufrica
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name recorded in the U.S. since the 18th century and now favoured by African Americans conscious of their ancestral heritage.

en.lifeSummary: When Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkney was born in 1135, in Methil, Fife, Scotland, her father, Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife, was 17 and her mother, Ada Huntingdon, was 11. She married Harold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkney about 1148. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1160, in Fife, Scotland, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkney est née en 1135, à Methil, Fife, Écosse, son père, Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Ada Huntingdon, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Harold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkney environ 1148. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1160, à Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkney 1135 in Methil, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife 17 und ihre Mutter Ada Huntingdon 11. Sie hat um 1148 Harold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1160 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Fife, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkney è nata il nel 1135 nel Methil, Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Ada Huntingdon, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Harold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkney circa 1148. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1160, nel Fife, Scotland, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkneyが1135年にスコットランドフィフメスイルで生まれた時，父Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fifeは17歳，母Ada Huntingdonは11歳であった。約1148年にHarold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1160年にスコットランドフィフで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkney(이)가 1135년 스컷랜드 피프 멧힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada Huntingdon(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 대략 1148년 Harold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1160년 스컷랜드 피프에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland: Dunfermline, Fib, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkney nasceu em 1135, em Methil, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Ada Huntingdon, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Harold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkney aproximadamente 1148. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1160, em Fife, Scotland, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkney родилась в 1135 г. в местности метил, фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada Huntingdon, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Harold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkney около 1148 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1160 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aufrica Duncandaughter of Methil Fife Maddad Earl of Caithness and Orkney nació en 1135, en Methil, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Ada Huntingdon, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Harold Maddadson Earl of Caithness and Orkney aproximadamente 1148. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1160, en Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 25 años.
